items.title: Champions League knockout phase draw result, bracket for Round of 16 and beyond in 2026 - sportingnews.com
items.summary: # Champions League knockout phase draw result, bracket for Round of 16 and beyond in 2026. The draw for the Champions League knockout phase takes place on Friday at UEFA's headquarters in Nyon, Switzerland. Playoffs to determine the final eight teams in the Round of 16 were completed on February 24 and 25, as Norwegian club Bodo/Glimt followed up their league-phase wins over Manchester City and Atletico Madrid with a stunning two-leg victory over last season's finalists Inter Milan. ## Teams in UEFA Champions League knockouts. Seeded teams are those who qualified for the Round of 16 directly via a top-eight finish in the league phase standings, while the unseeded teams are those who advanced through from the knockout-playoff round. ## UEFA Champions League knockout phase: Draw result, bracket. For the quarterfinals and semifinals, the teams listed first in each fixture will play the first legs of those ties at home. | QF 1 | RO16 1 vs.

items.title: 2026 UEFA Champions League final: Where is it, who is involved, how to watch - UEFA.com
items.summary: UEFA Champions League - 2026 UEFA Champions League final: Where is it, who is involved, how to watch - News. # 2026 UEFA Champions League final: Where is it, who is involved, how to watch. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League final between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal will take place at the Puskás Aréna in Budapest. Puskás Aréna will host the 2025/26 Champions League final UEFA via Getty Images. History will be made when the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League season concludes with the final between Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal in Budapest, Hungary. ## **Who is in the 2026 Champions League final?**. Paris Saint-Germain will face Arsenal in the 2026 Champions League final. The most prestigious club competition in world football, the UEFA Champions League will host its 2025/26 final at the Puskás Aréna. After hosting the UEFA Europa League final in 2023, the pinnacle of European football's club calendar arrives in Hungary and its capital for the first time.

items.title: How to run a 2026 UEFA Champions League bracket pool: Play for a dream trip, create your picks contest - CBS Sports
items.summary: site: media | arena: soccer | pageType: stories | section: | slug: how-to-run-a-2026-uefa-champions-league-bracket-pool-play-for-a-dream-trip-create-your-picks-contest | sport: soccer | route: article\_single.us | 6-keys: media/spln/soccer/reg/free/stories. ## The CBS Sports 2026 UEFA Champions League bracket games offer a chance to win the Ultimate London Getaway with tickets to a UCL match. The 2026 UEFA Champions League bracket has reached the Round of 16, and now is your chance to launch your CBS Sports UCL bracket pool to compete against friends, family and fellow soccer fans. There is a CBS Sports UEFA Champions League Bracket Challenge giving you the chance to win a trip to London to watch a UCL match and tour the UCL Today set. Once you've entered CBS Sports UEFA Champions League Bracket Game, you can also set up your own 2026 UCL pools on CBSSports.com and the CBS Sports app. * ### Join our 2026 UEFA Champions League Bracket Game, win a dream trip.

items.title: Champions League final referee and VAR: Match officials chosen for PSG vs. Arsenal as German crew named in 2026 - sportingnews.com
items.summary: # Champions League final referee and VAR: Match officials chosen for PSG vs. **MORE:** When is the 2026 UEFA Champions League final? ## Who is referee for Champions League final in 2026? The referee for the 2026 UEFA Champions League final between Arsenal and PSG is **Daniel Siebert** of Germany. He officiated three matches at Euro 2020, including a Round of 16 match between Wales and Denmark, and also officiated games in the 2021 FIFA Arab Cup. Interestingly, Siebert was selected for Champions League final duty in a year when he was *not* selected to officiate matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Instead, the only German head referee making the trip is Felix Zwayer, who is three years Siebert's senior and refereed the 2025 Europa League final. ## Who is VAR for Champions League final in 2026? The Video Assistant Referee (VAR) for the 2026 UEFA Champions League final will be **Bastian Dankert**, also of Germany.
